memory.summary: I just saw the Thursday 09:00 quiz is posted and our 19:00 meeting stays on, while Assignment A is still only halfway done. With my low energy and high stress, it feels like the clock is tightening fast.

desires: Don’t tank the assignment A/quiz situation and look sloppy to my teammate/prof—like I’m the weak link.
Get through tonight without crashing so hard tomorrow that I can’t function (sleep debt feels dangerous).
Reduce the spiraling stress by turning the “tight clock” into a small, controllable plan—even if it means cutting perfection.
Avoid having to re-negotiate the 19:00 meeting last minute; I want to show up like I’m dependable.

goals.description: Finish a solid first complete pass on Individual assignment A (target: complete the remaining ~50% and make it coherent, even if not perfect).
goals.rationale: If I stay sloppy/half-done, I’ll feel like the weak link to teammate/prof. Also it directly reduces the tight-clock stress by converting it into actual progress.

goals.description: Do structured quiz prep for Thursday 9AM: pick the top likely topics and complete at least one full practice set (or equivalent questions) with corrections.
goals.rationale: Thursday 9AM is the immediate threat; I don’t want to crash tomorrow. This keeps my performance dependable instead of panicky.

goals.description: Lock in a tiny, realistic recovery plan for tonight: decide exact sleep window + a 'shutdown' checklist so I stop overspinning when I’m tired.
goals.rationale: My sleep debt feels dangerous, so I need a controllable plan. Cutting perfection is fine—sleep discipline is how I avoid tomorrow’s meltdown.

goals.description: Prepare a dependable 19:00 meeting stance: write 3 bullet updates/questions for the team (no long rambling) so I show up ready even if assignment A isn’t perfect.
goals.rationale: I want to avoid last-minute renegotiation and look dependable. This is a compromise: quick prep that protects relationships without derailing the hard work.

agent.last_reasoning: Goal g1: finish the remaining ~50% with a coherent pass—this deadline is tonight, and I’m already at half done. Cross-domain: pushing A now reduces stress (and makes the 19:00 stance easier), but I’m wary of my low energy=3—so I’ll stop after 2 hours, no perfection spiral.
